weekView.noEventsDescription: No events scheduled for this week!

dayView.noEventsDescription: No events or lectures scheduled for this day!

calendar.urlMissingDescription: Add an iCal source from Turku AMK to start using your schedule.

onboarding.title: Set up your schedule
onboarding.description: Pick your group or add iCal.

calendarStep.title: Connect calendar
calendarStep.subtitle: Which group do you belong in? If you happen to have special classes that aren't scheduled for the rest of the group, consider setting up a custom calendar.

quickSetup.title: Quick setup
quickSetup.description: Choose your group to auto-fill the calendar source.

calendarStep.customNotFound: I don't see myself here! / I want to use a custom calendar

guide.title: How to get your iCal link
guide.step1: Sign in to Turku AMK Lukkarikone.
guide.step2: Open schedule management and create or edit your schedule.
guide.step4: Open the schedule and generate an iCal link, then copy it.

themeStep.title: Choose theme
themeStep.subtitle: We've got no color designers. Please send your impeccable theme ideas to avoinlukkari@juh.fi.

validation.mustBeTurkuAmk: URL must be from Turku AMK calendar system

status.refreshInfo: The schedule is automatically refreshed every 15 minutes to keep your calendar up to date. Data is provided by Lukkarikone's iCal-service.
status.errorInfo: Failed to refresh the calendar data. Displaying an older version from {{time}} instead.

errors.updateFailedDescription: The calendar data couldn't be refreshed. Showing an older version.

calendarModal.title: Set Calendar URL
calendarModal.description: Use quick setup for common groups or enter your own Turku AMK iCal URL.

quickSetup.title: Quick setup
quickSetup.description: Select a group to configure the calendar URL automatically.

customUrl.title: Custom URL
customUrl.description: Enter your calendar URL from Turku AMK calendar system
customUrl.label: Calendar URL

validation.mustBeTurkuAmk: URL must be from Turku AMK calendar system
